name: Condition Variable / Monitor
def: A primitive letting threads wait for a condition and be notified when it may have changed.
problem: Block efficiently until some shared state predicate becomes true, without busy-waiting.
mechanism: Under a held lock, wait atomically releases it and sleeps; notify/notifyAll wakes waiters, which re-check the predicate in a loop (guard against spurious wakeups).
limits: Lost-wakeup bugs if signalled outside lock
failures: Using if instead of while around wait
myths: "wait returns only when notified" — spurious wakeups happen; always re-check the predicate
